description: Standalone or InnoDB Cluster runtime topology, workload and node capacity.

panels.title: Certification / Applier Queue
panels.description: No data is expected for standalone topology.

panels.title: Flow-control Pressure
panels.description: Queue depth divided by the configured flow-control threshold.

panels.title: MySQL / Router Logs
panels.description: Existing node syslog streams filtered by the member IPs and native unit/app fields.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:in("mysql","mysqld","mysqld_exporter","mysqlrouter") OR app:~"mysqld-(${instances:pipe})") | fields level,ins,ip,app,unit,_msg

panels.title: Backup / Restore Logs
panels.description: Controlled backup and restore stage/result messages; SQL text is never centralized.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:mysql-backup OR app:~"mysql-backup-.*") | fields level,ins,ip,app,unit,_msg

title: MySQL Cluster
